name: Casserole Chicken Cordon Bleu
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the broccoli for about 2 minutes or until tender. Do not oversteam.
2. Moisten the stuffing mix with water as directed on the package.
3. Combine the steamed broccoli and moistened stuffing in a bowl.
4. Place the chicken breasts in a baking dish.
5. Sprinkle pepper over the chicken.
6. Top each chicken breast with a slice of Swiss cheese, a slice of ham, and an even layer of the broccoli-stuffing mixture.
7. Cover the dish and microwave on medium-high (70%) power for 15 minutes. Rotate the dish three times during cooking.
8. Remove the cover and top the casserole with chicken gravy.
9. Continue microwaving on high power until heated through, about 5-10 minutes.
